title: Casa&Casa Mechanical Kitchen Scales, Professional Food Weighing Scale with Classic Analog Display, Weight kg and lb for Meal Prep, Cooking & Baking, Precise Graduation 1g, White
features: 【PRECISE WEIGHT MEASUREMENT】: Prep for meals and recipes in less time with quick and reliable measurements. Our Mechanical Kitchen Scales have high precision mechanics for accurate and reliable readings and lets you weigh nuts, grains, fruit, and more with accuracy for precise portion control and healthier cooking.

【VINTAGE DESIGN 】: Polished stainless steel finish looks sophisticated, while the traditional design blends into any kitchen décor. This item will not clutter as other kitchen gadgets will do. Instead, it will elevate your counter, making you look nothing less than a kitchen professional.

【USER-FRIENDLY】: This scale can be recalibrated by using the adjustment knob at the unit's base. So in between weighing out ingredients for portion control or just parcelling out bulk foods, you will constantly be receiving accurate readings.
【EASY TO CLEAN】: Our food weighing scale can be easily wiped with a damp cloth, leaving no traces of food residues and water stains, leaving no fingerprints, and easier to keep clean and maintain.

【MUST HAVE KITCHEN ITEM 】: Get the most accurate portion sizes by weighing food with Casa&Casa Mechanical Kitchen Scale. Using a food scale is a fast and easy way to maintain a healthy lifestyle. From compact sizes and easy cleaning, Taylor has all the features to keep you at your best.
description: Product Description Cooking Becomes Easier with a Casa & Casa Mechanical Scale Don’t worry about putting too much or too few ingredients in your dishes anymore; Casa and Casa kitchen scales help relieve cooking stress for a culinary novice. The large mechanical dial with big graphics makes it easy to read the weight. This kitchen scale has the accuracy you can trust with Casa&Casa, plus a design that compliments your kitchen. The bowl is removable for easy washing and storage.
